para_trans: Coordination Committee for implementation of "Stop Diarrhoea Campaign 2026"
To set up a Coordination Committee...
Government of Maharashtra
Department of Public Health
Government Decision No: S. 1926 / E.O. No.1701683 / P.No.51 / CC2
10th Floor, B Wing, GoT Hospital Complex Building
New Ministry, SLAC. Marg, Mumbai - Yoo 001
Date: 12th June, 2026.
1) Ma. Letter from the Joint Secretary, Ministry of Health & Family Welfare, Government of India No. 2 -
28020/41/2018 - CH, Nirman Bhawan, New Delhi, dated 14.05.2026.
2) Ma. Letter from the Joint Secretary, Ministry of Health & Family Welfare, Government of India No. The Z-
28020/41/2018 - CH, Nirman Bhawan, New Delhi, dated 18.05.2026.
3) Commissioner (Urban), Health Services, Mumbai (Child Health Cell) e-file No.1692865.
The Proposal: -
Reducing infant and child mortality is an important goal, and diarrhea is the leading cause of infant mortality.
There's a reason. Child mortality can be prevented if diarrhoea is managed in a timely manner. excessive
Prevention is the best solution for management. Clean and safe for diarrhea prevention
Use of drinking water, soap for washing hands, breastfeeding, adequate with supplements
These include nutrition, personal hygiene, health education about infection prevention, and vaccination. or
Treatment with alternative ORS and ZINC is for early recovery and prevention.
Remedies play an important role in preventing death. For this, the central government has decided to "Stop Diarrhoea."
The implementation of the "campaign" has been notified. for the implementation and planning of the mission.
The formation of a coordination committee was under the consideration of the government.
Government Decision: - As per the guidelines of the Central Government read- 1 and 2, the infant and child mortality rate in the state is low.
To plan preventive measures for management of overdose, on patients with diarrhoea.
The "Stop Diarrhoea Campaign" needs to be implemented in the state to ensure timely appropriate treatment.
The State Level Coordination Committee for implementation and planning of the Mission is as follows:
The establishment is being approved by the government.
The area decision is available on the Government of Maharashtra's www.maharashtra.gov.in website.
